name: maxtac
description: Multi-agent systems vulnerability research workflows for authorized kernel, binary, and open-source targets.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent systems vulnerability research for TAC
interface.longDescription: MaxTAC coordinates authorized vulnerability research campaigns across XNU, Windows kernel-adjacent artifacts, native binaries, and open-source systems code. It prepares target profiles, routes specialized Auditor subagents, tracks findings, debates reachability and exploitability, proofs issues in lab environments, and packages concise reports.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC to prepare this systems target and select Auditor subagents.
Run a MaxTAC discovery campaign against this authorized kernel or binary target.
Triage this finding with MaxTAC Debaters and decide whether it is confident.
Proof this MaxTAC finding in a clean lab and create a report packet.
